zh.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco是Roger de Banco和Mrs Roger de Banco的女兒，於大約1220年出生在英國戴文。她於1245年與Roger de Prideaux I在英國素瑞阿德萊斯同結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1280年享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco是Roger de Banco和Mrs Roger de Banco的女儿，于大约1220年出生在英国戴文。她于1245年与Roger de Prideaux I在英国素瑞阿德萊斯同结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1280年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Banco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian (Bankó), Slovak (also Bankó), Croatian, and Slovenian: diminutive of Ban (Hungarian and Slovak Bán).

variants.name: Ban
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yoshimi, Akihiko, Hiroki, Junji, Keiko, Keisuke, Koji, Masanori, Masataka, Misa, Misao, Naoki.  Korean Yong, Young, Chea, Chun Hung, Chunsheng, Dong, Eun, Hee, Hyun, Hyung.  Hungarian Zoltan, Bela, Imre, Laszlo, Tibor.

Croatian, Slovenian, and Serbian; Hungarian and Slovak (Bán): nickname from Hungarian bán, South Slavic ban, or Slovak bán ‘governor’. Hungarian Bán was also used as a personal name. Historically, the word ban is found mostly as a Croatian status name for a regional military or administrative leader. The surname possibly denoted a person in the service of a ban or one who came from a land under the authority of a ban. As a surname of Hungarian origin Ban is also common in Romania.
Slovenian: from a short form of the personal name   Urban  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: apparently of Germanic origin, representing a feminine short form of names containing the element gild ‘sacrifice’ ( compare e.g. Hermengildo ). Its occasional use in the English-speaking world since the 19th century may have been prompted by the character in Verdi's Rigoletto, the innocent daughter of the hunchback jester Rigoletto , who becomes the object of the Duke of Mantua's affections and is murdered on her father's orders as the result of a series of misunderstandings.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco was born about 1220, in Devon, England as the daughter of Roger de Banco and Mrs Roger de Banco. She married Roger de Prideaux I in 1245, in Addlestone, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1280, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco est née environ 1220, à Devon, Angleterre, fille de Roger de Banco et Mrs Roger de Banco. Elle a épousé Roger de Prideaux I en 1245, à Addlestone, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1280, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco wurde um 1220 in Devon, England, als Tochter von Roger de Banco und Mrs Roger de Banco geboren. Sie hat 1245 in Addlestone, Surrey, England Roger de Prideaux I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1280 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco è nata il circa 1220 nel Devon, England come figlia di Roger de Banco e Mrs Roger de Banco. Lei sposato Roger de Prideaux I nel 1245, nel Addlestone, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1280, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilda de Bancoは約1220年にイギリスデボンでRoger de BancoとMrs Roger de Bancoの娘として生まれた。1245年にイギリススリーアッドレストーンでRoger de Prideaux Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1280年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco(은)는 대략 1220년 영국 데폰에서 Roger de Banco(와)과 Mrs Roger de Banco의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 수리 애들레스톤에서 Roger de Prideaux I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Devon, Inglaterra filha de Roger de Banco e Mrs Roger de Banco. Ela casou-se com Roger de Prideaux I em 1245, em Addlestone, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1280, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilda de Banco родилась около 1220 г. в местности девон, Англия. Её родителей звали Roger de Banco и Mrs Roger de Banco. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Prideaux I в 1245 г. в местности аддлестоун, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1280 г. в возрасте 62 лет.
